challenges.title: Simple Blog Post
challenges.description:
Create a blog post page with an

title, at least two

paragraphs of content, and an unordered list (

    ) with at least three items. Assign your code to the variable `html`.
challenges.starter_code:
html = """
<!-- Create a simple blog post -->

"""
challenges.test_code:
assert '

' in html.lower(), 'Should contain an

blog title' assert '

' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a closing tag' assert html.lower().count('

') >= 2, 'Should contain at least two paragraphs' assert '

    ' in html.lower(), 'Should contain an unordered list' assert html.lower().count('
  • ') >= 3, 'Should contain at least three list items'
hints:
A blog post typically has a title (

), body text (

), and sometimes lists.
Use <ul> for an unordered list and wrap each item in <li>.

challenges.title: Full Blog Post with Link and Image
challenges.description:
Create a complete blog post with an

title, an

subtitle, at least two paragraphs, an ordered list (
    ) with at least three items, a link ( with href), and an image ( with src and alt). Assign your code to the variable `html`.
challenges.starter_code:
html = """
<!-- Create a full blog post with link and image -->

"""
challenges.test_code:
assert '

' in html.lower(), 'Should contain an

title' assert '

' in html.lower(), 'Should contain an

subtitle' assert html.lower().count('

') >= 2, 'Should contain at least two paragraphs' assert '

    ' in html.lower(), 'Should contain an ordered list' assert html.lower().count('
  1. ') >= 3, 'Should contain at least three list items' assert ' link tag' assert 'href=' in html.lower(), 'Link should have an href attribute' assert ' tag' assert 'src=' in html.lower(), 'Image should have a src attribute' assert 'alt=' in html.lower(), 'Image should have an alt attribute'
hints: Links use text and images use .
An ordered list uses <ol> instead of <ul> to number the items automatically.
